violations.text: The dumpster outside is located on grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

Meatballs were observed stored in a hot box (ambient 158) at 112 degrees. No delivery temperatures were available at the time of inspection. Establishment used a microwaved and reheated all meatballs to at least 165. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026

The dumpster outside is located on dirt/grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026
The wall next to the dish machine was observed with an accumulation of bio-film. Area to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026
The garbage disposal was observed in poor repair. Equipment to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025

Hot dogs on the broken steam table were observed at 99 degrees. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. It was end of service for the day. All other hot dogs were disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
The garbage disposal and steam table were observed not in good repair. Steam table was unable to hold food above 135 degrees. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

The floor in the dry storage area has an small accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025

The dumpster outside is located on grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
The bottom hot hold door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2024

The dumpster outside is located on grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2024
